allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add security scan workflows for meal-planner, home-manager, and vehicle-manager

- Add Bandit static code analysis for Python security issues
- Add Safety dependency vulnerability scanning
- Add Trivy container image security scanning
- Weekly scheduled runs \(Mondays 9 AM UTC\)
- PR comments with security summary
- Artifact uploads with 90-day retention

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
